Off Calendar May-28-2008 Continued To Jun-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Michael Elwell,Attorney-In-Fact Of Walter Lenci, For Order Authorizing Him To Establish Special Needs Trust With Property Of The Principa
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jane Kerr for Michael Elwell (Petitioner).

The Court questioned the $10,000.00 bond amount. Ms. Kerr reported that the annuity paid a monthly amount of $360.00, that $10,000.00 was the minimun amount of a bond, that she was not asking for Court supervision, and asked the Court to modify the trust to exclude the language of "subject to continued Court jurisdiction". The Court took the matter under submission.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin. Bailiff: T. Bonner. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
